canonical_definition: Across the provided literature, MSMARCO is consistently characterized as a large-scale dataset used for evaluation. Its most prevalent application is for measuring `Information retrieval`, with papers defining it as a tool for assessing tasks like "in-domain retrieval performance" (Promptriever: Instruction-Trained Retrievers Can Be Prompted Like Language Models). Several sources also define and use it as a benchmark for `Reading comprehension` and `Question answering`, including `Open-domain question answering`. A more specific line of work operationalizes MSMARCO as a "passage-ranking benchmark" (BadJudge: Backdoor Vulnerabilities of LLM-As-A-Judge) to evaluate `Ranking` in a retrieval setting. The dataset is described as a "large-scale collection of queries and passages," and specific subsets like the TREC Deep Learning tracks (DL19, DL20) and "msmarco-passages" are mentioned. One paper also uses the dataset to measure aspects of `Safety`, demonstrating how a reranker can be backdoored on its passages. Evaluation on the MS MARCO Dev set is reported using the MRR metric.
papers: HELMET: How to Evaluate Long-context Models Effectively and Thoroughly
MMTEB: Massive Multilingual Text Embedding Benchmark
NV-Embed: Improved Techniques for Training LLMs as Generalist Embedding Models
PICASO: Permutation-Invariant Context Composition with State Space Models
Promptriever: Instruction-Trained Retrievers Can Be Prompted Like Language Models
Provence: efficient and robust context pruning for retrieval-augmented generation
RAG-DDR: Optimizing Retrieval-Augmented Generation Using Differentiable Data Rewards
SePer: Measure Retrieval Utility Through The Lens Of Semantic Perplexity Reduction

definitions.text: The Microsoft Machine Reading Comprehension (MSMARCO) dataset, a large-scale collection of queries and passages used for evaluating reading comprehension and information retrieval tasks.
definitions.paper: PICASO: Permutation-Invariant Context Composition with State Space Models

definitions.text: A passage-ranking benchmark used to evaluate reranker judges in a retrieval setting.
The MS MARCO Question Answering (MARCO QA) dataset, a large-scale benchmark for reading comprehension and question answering.
definitions.paper: RAG-DDR: Optimizing Retrieval-Augmented Generation Using Differentiable Data Rewards

definitions.text: The Microsoft Machine Reading Comprehension (MS MARCO) dataset, including its TREC Deep Learning track subsets (DL19, DL20), used here to evaluate in-domain retrieval performance.
definitions.paper: Promptriever: Instruction-Trained Retrievers Can Be Prompted Like Language Models

relationships.paper: RAG-DDR: Optimizing Retrieval-Augmented Generation Using Differentiable Data Rewards
